So this is probably the lowest risk thing that you can do or the least amount of change that you can do. I don't wanna say lowest risk, but the least amount of change that you can do to your existing model. All right, and so the hook here is that instead of saying for nothing extra, which is like what we did in the other one, it's for the same price as your membership because ultimately you're just gonna charge them, double their membership, which should be $50 a week minimally to get them great results. And so I wanna personally coach you and the best way to do this if you can is have some sort of commemorative event. So if you just had a birthday or you're about to have a birthday or your wife had a birthday or the gym had a birthday, any kind of commemorative thing. If you had a holiday recently, there's just look at your calendar, look at the things that have come, if someone, I mean, I hope God forbid something bad happened, but if someone passed away or if you had, this isn't as bad, but if your child had a birthday or you had a child born, whatever it is, having something to commemorate gives a big reason why you're making a significant change. So it's like, hey, because I just turned 31, I've had a lot of time to reflect on how far we come and what we do here. After that reflection, I decided to make a commitment to fulfill all my promises that excites me to no end. So I wanna meet with every person and commit to making a 12 month goal and I'll guarantee you hit it should you take me up on my requirements, okay? And so the beautiful thing here is that like, you're basically saying, hey, I'm gonna meet with every single person one-on-one and we're gonna go over your goals and I'm gonna guarantee that you get there. So there's really nothing that anyone should be afraid of and then you're just gonna go through the sale when you meet with every one of your clients and sell them one-on-one training at half off. So instead of a $100 a week, they're gonna be getting it for $50 a week and you're gonna guarantee that they get their result, which we'll go over more in the sales portion. But this is more or less the group post, just be super amped, be super excited in the video and then cover this stuff. You're gonna put a link for them to schedule a time with you and just make sure that you're saying, like, I'm gonna meet you with 100% of you. So like, you know, you can either make it easy on me by scheduling or make it hard on me. So I'm gonna call you your ass until you die. And that's honestly the big thing.
